name: eat-to-live
description: Dr. Joel Fuhrman's Eat to Live — apply the Nutritarian approach to transform your health through nutrient density: eat for maximum nutrition per calorie, lose weight sustainably, and prevent or reverse chronic disease
useCase: Helps anyone improve their health through the Nutritarian diet — focusing on ANDI scores, G-BOMBS, and the 6-week jumpstart plan to achieve weight loss, disease reversal, and lifelong vitality through high-nutrient eating.
knownRisks: This book provides dietary guidance, not medical advice — users should consult their physician before making significant dietary changes, especially if on medication
The 6-week plan may not be suitable for everyone — individual nutritional needs vary
